reasons.reason: All 4 acceptance criteria are proven with concrete evidence: AC1 from a cold-target CDP skeleton capture plus populated-state proof, AC2-AC4 from trace-backed assertions and in-frame screenshots.
The final screenshots show the exact claimed UI states in frame: loading skeleton, populated recent activity, activity-route navigation, and no-transactions empty state.
The recipe runner consistently attached after the transient cold-load skeleton in this warmed slot, so AC1 required one direct CDP cold-target capture outside the traced recipe path.

better_version_guidance: Add a first-class recipe action for opening a fresh extension page target so transient cold-load states can be captured inside the trace rather than with a sidecar CDP step.
Honor --artifacts-dir for screenshot output paths directly so review artifacts do not need manual copying from test-artifacts/screenshots.
